title: Finder Full-Loop Grounding Demo
query: take me to the desk between two chairs

stages.name: Plan
stages.line: Parse the request into a primary target, support context, and scoped frame budget.
stages.caption: Finder first turns the language request into target phrases and routes a compact evidence set for the loop.
logs: planner.reason: Loop 0: LLM planner selected 'desk' as the primary target with 1 supporting target(s).

evidence.goals: find all desk candidates in the scene; for each desk candidate, detect nearby chairs to verify the 'between two chairs' relation; return the desk that best satisfies the spatial constraint

stages.name: Detect
stages.line: Run SAM3 only as the open-vocabulary mask proposal backend, then build 3D candidates.
stages.caption: The detector surfaces multiple plausible object masks; downstream Finder stages keep the ambiguity instead of taking the top SAM3 mask directly.
logs: detect.backend: remote SAM3 masks, Finder 3D clustering and dedup
detect.top: desk_l0_000 det=0.93; desk_l0_003 det=0.87; desk_l0_001 det=0.86; desk_l0_002 det=0.68

stages.name: Evidence
stages.line: Attach candidate-local geometry and support-object evidence before planning selection.
stages.caption: Candidate evidence makes support relations explicit, so the later selector compares candidates in context rather than by mask confidence alone.
logs: evidence.reason: geometry and support cues are available to selection planner

stages.name: Selection Plan
stages.line: Shortlist candidates and choose comparison axes for verification.
stages.caption: The selection planner narrows the candidate pool and specifies what relation or attribute evidence must be checked.
logs: selection.reason: All desk candidates have local chair-pair evidence executed. desk_l0_001 shows strongest relation evidence: surface_gap_m=0.0 (rank 1), 3 support objects detected, and very_near...

actions: verify spatial relation 'between two chairs' on shortlisted candidates; compare chair proximity evidence (surface_gap_m, num_support_objects); request additional views if needed for disambiguation

stages.name: Select
stages.line: Compare shortlisted candidates with VLM verification and select the strongest candidate.
stages.caption: The selector compares the shortlisted candidates and records rationales for why the accepted candidate beats alternatives.
logs: select.scores: desk_l0_002 sel=0.71; desk_l0_001 sel=0.53; desk_l0_004 sel=0.47

select.reason: Three desk candidates were evaluated based on visual evidence and spatial relations to chairs. Desk_l0_002 (Image 2) is the strongest match, appearing as a dark desk clearly situated betw...
verifier.summary: Three desk candidates were evaluated based on visual evidence and spatial relations to chairs. Desk_l0_002 (Image 2) is the strongest match, appearing as a dark desk clearly sit...

stages.name: Judge
stages.caption: The loop judge accepts the selected candidate once the evidence is sufficient; otherwise the same protocol can continue with feedback.
logs: judge.reason: desk_l0_002 is the strongest candidate: verifier shows 'plausible' with strong type and color match, explicitly notes 'flanked by two chairs', and has zero surface gap with 3 support objects. desk_l0_001 fails the 'be...
